title: C60 · Reconstruct-Later Threat Model for Behavioural Data

story.text:
# 💡 C60 · Reconstruct-Later Threat Model for Behavioural Data
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Behavioural data captured today is reconstructable into structured-PII-equivalent signal by future ML models. Provisional (65%). The threat is the future-reconstruction capability, not the present-data shape. Forces present-time privacy controls to assume future-decoder capability.

## Edges in

- [[Tome II Act 7: The Behavioural Mosca]] *introduces* →
